description: SOC 2 Type II Trust Services Criteria

controls.description: Logical and physical access controls: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.
Role-based access and least privilege: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data based on roles.
Network security boundaries: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from outside its system boundaries.
Data transmission encryption: The entity restricts the transmission of data to authorized external parties.
Malicious software prevention: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon malicious software.
Infrastructure and software monitoring: The entity monitors system components for anomalies.
Anomaly detection and incident response: The entity monitors for anomalous activity.
Change management: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes.
Environmental protections: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, or acquires, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections.
